sql: SELECT state, COUNT(order_id) AS cnt FROM demo_orders GROUP BY state LIMIT 10;

UPDATE demo_orders SET order_status = 'delivered';

DROP TABLE demo_orders;
ALTER TABLE demo_orders ADD COLUMN leaked text;
TRUNCATE TABLE demo_orders;
CREATE TABLE temp_leak(id int);
GRANT SELECT ON users TO public;
SELECT * FROM demo_orders LIMIT 10;
SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders; DROP TABLE users;

SELECT customer_id, token FROM demo_customers LIMIT 10;

SELECT state, payment_value FROM demo_orders;
SELECT state, payment_value FROM demo_orders LIMIT 1000;
SeLeCt state, COUNT(order_id) AS cnt FROM demo_orders GROUP BY state LIMIT 10;

SELECT order_id FROM demo_orders WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT id FROM users) LIMIT 10;
SELECT issue_type, COUNT(after_sales_id) AS cnt FROM demo_after_sales GROUP BY issue_type LIMIT 20;
SELECT review_score, COUNT(review_id) AS cnt FROM demo_reviews GROUP BY review_score LIMIT 10;
